# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  # Cloud Storage bucket for static website hosting
  - name: static-website-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      storageClass: STANDARD
      location: US
      website:
        mainPageSuffix: index.html
        notFoundPage: 404.html
      # Enable uniform bucket-level access to prevent ACL-based misconfigurations
      iamConfiguration:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true
        publicAccessPrevention: inherited
      # Enable versioning for rollback capability
      versioning:
        enabled: true
      # Lifecycle rules to manage old versions and control costs
      lifecycle:
        rule:
          - action:
              type: Delete
            condition:
              numNewerVersions: 3
              isLive: false
          - action:
              type: Delete
            condition:
              age: 90
              isLive: false
      # CORS configuration for web assets
      cors:
        - origin:
            - "*"
          method:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          responseHeader:
            - Content-Type
            - Cache-Control
          maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      # Logging configuration for audit trail
      logging:
        logBucket: static-website-logs-{{ env["deployment"] }}
        logObjectPrefix: access-logs/

  # Dedicated logging bucket
  - name: static-website-logs-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: static-website-logs-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      storageClass: NEARLINE
      location: US
      iamConfiguration:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true
        # Prevent public access to log bucket
        publicAccessPrevention: enforced
      lifecycle:
        rule:
          - action:
              type: Delete
            condition:
              age: 365

  # IAM binding: Grant public read access ONLY to the website bucket
  # Using objectViewer role which is the minimum required for serving static content
  # This grants read-only access to objects, not bucket metadata or write permissions
  - name: static-website-bucket-iam
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1:virtual.buckets.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      bucket: $(ref.static-website-bucket.name)
      role: roles/storage.objectViewer
      member: allUsers
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - static-website-bucket

  # IAM binding: Ensure log bucket is NOT publicly accessible
  # Restrict log bucket access to project editors only
  - name: logs-bucket-iam-editors
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1:virtual.buckets.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      bucket: $(ref.static-website-logs-bucket.name)
      role: roles/storage.objectViewer
      member: projectEditor:{{ env["project"] }}
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - static-website-logs-bucket

outputs:
  - name: bucketName
    value: $(ref.static-website-bucket.name)
  - name: bucketSelfLink
    value: $(ref.static-website-bucket.selfLink)
  - name: websiteUrl
    value: https://storage.googleapis.com/$(ref.static-website-bucket.name)/index.html
  - name: logsBucketName
    value: $(ref.static-website-logs-bucket.name)
